use std::sync::Mutex;

fn update_state(state: &Mutex<Vec<String>>, item: String) -> Result<(), String> {
    let mut guard = state.lock().map_err(|e| format!("lock poisoned: {}", e))?;
    guard.push(item);
    Ok(())
}

fn read_state(state: &Mutex<HashMap<String, u64>>, key: &str) -> Result<u64, String> {
    let guard = state.lock().map_err(|e| format!("lock poisoned: {}", e))?;
    Ok(*guard.get(key).unwrap_or(&0))
}
